info.title: Rumil API
info.description: Read-only API for the Rumil research workspace.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api Projects Get
Response List Project Runs Api Projects  Project Id  Runs Get
Response Get Links From Api Pages  Page Id  Links From Get
Response Get Links To Api Pages  Page Id  Links To Get

get.description: Pages that depend on this page (inbound DEPENDS_ON links).

schema.title: Response Get Dependents Api Pages  Page Id  Dependents Get

get.description: Pages that this page depends on (outbound DEPENDS_ON links).

schema.title: Response Get Dependencies Api Pages  Page Id  Dependencies Get

get.description:
Aggregate stats over all pages/links/calls in a project.

Baseline rows are always included; when `staged_run_id` is provided as a
query param, rows from that staged run are also included and its mutation
events (supersede_page, delete_link) are overlayed.

Aggregate stats over the 2-hop undirected neighborhood around a question.

Returns 404 if the target page is not a question. Staged-run visibility
matches get_project_stats.

schema.title: Response List Root Questions Api Projects  Project Id  Questions Get
Response List Calls Api Projects  Project Id  Calls Get
Response Get Child Calls Api Calls  Call Id  Children Get
Response Get Call Events Api Calls  Call Id  Events Get
Response List Ab Evals Api Ab Evals Get
Response List Llm Exchanges Api Calls  Call Id  Llm Exchanges Get
Response Get Page Run Api Pages  Page Id  Run Get

CallSummary.title: CallSummary
CallSummary.description:
Lightweight Call representation for tree views — excludes bulky fields
like review_json, result_summary, and context_page_ids.
